title: Nightsinger
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|night}}
[[File:Nightsinger.jpg|thumb|right|150px|A nightsinger]]
'''Nightsingers''' were native to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nightsinger's Orb]] in the [[Pella system/Legends|Pella system]].

These large bat-winged predators had sharp talons, a hooked beak and elongated heads used as rudders. Nightsingers were known for their eerie calls and whistles. Their high-pitched screams were used for communication and as a form of sonar to maneuver through windswept canyons and locate prey. They were traditionally hunted by members of the [[Hejaran family]], who used gliders to reach their nesting areas high in canyon crags.

==Appearances==
